name: greeter-log
command: D="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}/skills/hello/logs"; declare -A seen; while true; do for f in "$D"/*.log; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; while IFS= read -r l; do case "$l" in '[done]'*|'[error]'*) k="$f|$l"; [ -n "${seen[$k]}" ] || { seen[$k]=1; printf '%s\n' "$l"; };; esac; done < "$f"; done; sleep 1; done
description: greeter skill log — fires when a greeting completes ([done]) or errors ([error])
